summary: This role is a strong match for your preference for procedural work and predictable daytime hours, offering an excellent work-life balance with virtually no on-call requirements. While the 'production line' pace and high-stakes nature of cancer screening introduce significant emotional stress and physical strain, the protocol-driven thinking style aligns perfectly with your cognitive strengths. To ensure long-term career sustainability, you must proactively manage the repetitive physical demands and the emotional labor associated with patient anxiety.
